title: The intersection of rurality and dementia prevalence in Australia for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander and non‐Indigenous peoples
authors: Antonia J Clarke; Marwan Ahmed; Judith M. Katzenellenbogen; John Towney Wiradjuri; A. Balabanski; Adrienne Withall Dharawal Yuin; Kylie Radford; A. Brodtmann
abstract: To determine the nationwide prevalence of dementia as it intersects with rurality for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander and non‐Indigenous peoples in Australia.
